name: app.R
content:
install.packages("rsconnect")
library(rsconnect)
library(shiny)
library(ggplot2)

ui <- fluidPage(
  titlePanel("Gamma Distribution Demo"),
  
  sidebarLayout(
    sidebarPanel(
      numericInput("shape", "Shape parameter", value = 2, min = 0.1, step = 0.1),
      numericInput("rate", "Rate parameter", value = 1, min = 0.1, step = 0.1),
      sliderInput("xmax", "Maximum x value", min = 5, max = 50, value = 15)
    ),
    
    mainPanel(
      h4("Gamma density plot"),
      plotOutput("gamma_plot"),
      h4("Summary"),
      verbatimTextOutput("summary")
    )
  )
)

server <- function(input, output) {
  
  gamma_data <- reactive({
    x <- seq(0, input$xmax, length.out = 500)
    
    data.frame(
      x = x,
      density = dgamma(
        x,
        shape = input$shape,
        rate = input$rate
      )
    )
  })
  
  output$gamma_plot <- renderPlot({
    ggplot(gamma_data(), aes(x = x, y = density)) +
      geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
      labs(
        title = "Gamma Distribution Density",
        subtitle = paste(
          "Shape =", input$shape,
          "| Rate =", input$rate
        ),
        x = "x",
        y = "Density"
      ) +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 13)
  })
  
  output$summary <- renderPrint({
    mean_value <- input$shape / input$rate
    variance_value <- input$shape / input$rate^2
    
    cat("Gamma distribution parameters\n")
    cat("-----------------------------\n")
    cat("Shape:", input$shape, "\n")
    cat("Rate:", input$rate, "\n\n")
    
    cat("Calculated values\n")
    cat("-----------------\n")
    cat("Mean:", round(mean_value, 4), "\n")
    cat("Variance:", round(variance_value, 4), "\n")
    cat("Standard deviation:", round(sqrt(variance_value), 4), "\n")
  })
}

shinyApp(ui = ui, server = server)
